description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow should have four jobs: build-clang-9-linux, build-clang-9-linux-no-stl, build-clang-10-osx, and build-clang-10-osx-no-stl. Each job should run on a specific OS, check out the code, build with cmake and a specific clang version, and run tests.
